title: Planet Landings
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM Touchdown WHERE OnStation = 0 AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {count} planetary surface landing(s) during the report period, touching down on worlds ranging from airless rock to high-gravity giants — each one requiring manual approach or SRV deployment rather than staying safely in orbit.
details.help: Touchdown events with OnStation = false represent genuine planetary landings rather than station docking. Does not deduplicate revisits to the same body.

tagLines: Planetary touchdown events recorded. Surface operations data archived by the Pilots Federation.
You could have stayed in orbit. You didn't. Respect.
Every landing is a choice — to go down there, to touch the ground, to leave a bootprint.
